overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in futuristic armor walking through a dimly lit space station corridor. The environment features industrial metal architecture, large viewports overlooking space, green ambient lighting with red emergency lights, and 'NICE VIEW' stenciled on the floor.

entered.detail: large window showing stars and space outside
industrial metal bulkhead walls with piping and panels
triangular caution sign on the floor
red warning lights on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a space station observation deck with a large viewport showing space outside. The player character stands with an NPC companion before turning to walk away at 2 seconds. The environment features industrial metal walls, red emergency lighting, and caution signage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor past the 'NICE VIEW' floor marking

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the space station corridor, passing the 'NICE VIEW' floor stencil. The viewport remains visible to the left showing the starfield outside, while the yellow warning sign is left behind. The corridor maintains its industrial aesthetic with metal walls and artificial lighting.

events.description: approaching the metal security door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the security door at the corridor end

entered.detail: large metal security door with warning stripes at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor where a large metal security door awaits. The space viewport and floor signage are now behind as the character moves toward the door, completing the walk through this section of the station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide observation deck through a narrow industrial corridor toward a secure exit. It begins with the player character and an NPC companion standing before a large viewport overlooking the starfield, surrounded by metal walls and red emergency lighting. As the character turns and walks away, the camera follows them past a yellow warning sign and a NICE VIEW stencil on the floor, while the viewport remains visible to the left. The scene then shifts focus from the open vista to the enclosing industrial architecture of the hallway. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they leave the signage and viewports behind, moving steadily toward a large metal security door at the end of the corridor.
